iteration_1_baseline.notes: Original verbose skill. Extract failed: regex only matched ERROR lines (7/20). Replace: missed some debug removal and var replacement.

iteration_2.notes: Added focused log parsing recipe with optional message group. Extract improved but model changed \S+ to restrictive char class, missing query string lines.

iteration_3.notes: Over-specified skill confused model. Extract got stuck in 38-message loop. Replace: model commented out lines instead of deleting.

iteration_4.notes: Simplified skill back. Extract perfect. Replace: model ignored var->let/const instruction entirely.

iteration_5_final.notes: Added explicit Python script recipe for code cleanup with step-by-step var replacement. Both tasks score high.

changes_made: Replaced verbose generic regex cookbook with concise, task-focused recipes
Added log parsing Python recipe with \S+ for paths and optional message group
Added code cleanup Python recipe with explicit var->let->const pipeline
Emphasized writing scripts to files (not inline) to avoid shell quoting issues
Added critical rules: parse ALL lines, verify counts, remove means delete
